'''鈭歝h-b-f''' ('''kachabaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heminephrectomize|heminephrectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heminephrectomize|heminephrectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| kachabaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichabaf|thichabaf]] || [[word:jichabaf|jichabaf]] || [[word:shichabaf|shichabaf]] || [[word:kichabaf|kichabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchabaf|thuthuchabaf]] || [[word:jujuchabaf|jujuchabaf]] || [[word:shushuchabaf|shushuchabaf]] || [[word:kukuchabaf|kukuchabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchabaf|thuchabaf]] || [[word:juchabaf|juchabaf]] || [[word:shuchabaf|shuchabaf]] || [[word:kuchabaf|kuchabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchabaf|thuchabaf]] || [[word:juchabaf|juchabaf]] || [[word:shuchabaf|shuchabaf]] || [[word:kuchabaf|kuchabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechabaf|thechabaf]] || [[word:jechabaf|jechabaf]] || [[word:shechabaf|shechabaf]] || [[word:kechabaf|kechabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochabaf|thothochabaf]] || [[word:jojochabaf|jojochabaf]] || [[word:shoshochabaf|shoshochabaf]] || [[word:kokochabaf|kokochabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochabaf|thochabaf]] || [[word:jochabaf|jochabaf]] || [[word:shochabaf|shochabaf]] || [[word:kochabaf|kochabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochabaf|thochabaf]] || [[word:jochabaf|jochabaf]] || [[word:shochabaf|shochabaf]] || [[word:kochabaf|kochabaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]] || [[word:chabaf|chabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chabaf|th忙chabaf]] || [[word:j忙chabaf|j忙chabaf]] || [[word:sh忙chabaf|sh忙chabaf]] || [[word:k忙chabaf|k忙chabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachabaf|thathachabaf]] || [[word:jajachabaf|jajachabaf]] || [[word:shashachabaf|shashachabaf]] || [[word:kakachabaf|kakachabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachabaf|thachabaf]] || [[word:jachabaf|jachabaf]] || [[word:shachabaf|shachabaf]] || [[word:kachabaf|kachabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachabaf|thachabaf]] || [[word:jachabaf|jachabaf]] || [[word:shachabaf|shachabaf]] || [[word:kachabaf|kachabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachabaf|shachabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachabaf|goshachabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachabaf|gokishachabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachabafn眉|shachabafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachabafnkn眉|goshachabafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabafn眉|gokishachabafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachabafsh毛|shachabafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachabafnksh毛|goshachabafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachabafsh毛|gokishachabafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabafro|shachabafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabafnkro|goshachabafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabafro|gokishachabafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabafmu|shachabafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabafnkmu|goshachabafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabafmu|gokishachabafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachabafsher|shachabafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachabafnksher|goshachabafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachabafsher|gokishachabafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachabafng|shachabafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachabafnkng|goshachabafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachabafng|gokishachabafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachabafya|shachabafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachabafnkya|goshachabafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachabafya|gokishachabafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachabafyam|shachabafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachabafnkyam|goshachabafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachabafyam|gokishachabafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabafn眉sh毛|shachabafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabafnkn眉sh毛|goshachabafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabafn眉sh毛|gokishachabafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabafn眉ro|shachabafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabafnkn眉ro|goshachabafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabafn眉ro|gokishachabafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabafn眉mu|shachabafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabafnkn眉mu|goshachabafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabafn眉mu|gokishachabafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabafsh毛n眉|shachabafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabafnksh毛n眉|goshachabafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabafsh毛n眉|gokishachabafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabafsh毛ro|shachabafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabafnksh毛ro|goshachabafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabafsh毛ro|gokishachabafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabafsh毛mu|shachabafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabafnksh毛mu|goshachabafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabafsh毛mu|gokishachabafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabafron眉|shachabafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabafnkron眉|goshachabafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabafron眉|gokishachabafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabafrosh毛|shachabafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabafnkrosh毛|goshachabafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabafrosh毛|gokishachabafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabafromu|shachabafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabafnkromu|goshachabafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabafromu|gokishachabafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabafmun眉|shachabafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabafnkmun眉|goshachabafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabafmun眉|gokishachabafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabafmush毛|shachabafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabafnkmush毛|goshachabafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabafmush毛|gokishachabafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabafmuro|shachabafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabafnkmuro|goshachabafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabafmuro|gokishachabafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
